commands.name: EventConsumer
commands.command_line: "C:\Windows\System32\WindowsPowerShell\V1.0\powershell.exe" -NonInteractive -WindowStyle Hidden -NoProfile Get-WMIObject -Namespace root\Subscription -Class __EventConsumer | Select *, @{n='CreatorSID'; e={(New-Object System.Security.Principal.SecurityIdentifier($_.CreatorSID, 0)).Value}}, @{n='CreatorName'; e={(New-Object System.Security.Principal.SecurityIdentifier($_.CreatorSID, 0)).Translate([System.Security.Principal.NTAccount])}} -ExcludeProperty CreatorSID,PSComputerName, __GENUS, __SUPERCLASS, __DYNASTY, __RELPATH, __PATH, __PROPERTY_COUNT, __DERIVATION, __SERVER, __NAMESPACE | Export-Csv -NoTypeInformation -Encoding UTF8 -Path "C:\Windows\TEMP\WorkingTemp\EventConsumer.csv"

commands.name: AWS_Metadata
commands.command_line: "C:\Windows\System32\WindowsPowerShell\V1.0\powershell.exe" -NonInteractive -WindowStyle Hidden -NoProfile $metadata_server='http://169.254.169.254/latest/';$web=New-Object Net.WebClient;$web.Headers.Add('X-aws-ec2-metadata-token-ttl-seconds','21600');$parameters=New-Object System.Collections.Specialized.NameValueCollection;$token=[System.Text.Encoding]::Default.GetString($web.UploadValues($metadata_server+'api/token','PUT',$parameters));$result_dict=New-Object 'System.Collections.Generic.Dictionary[string,string]';Function api_gen($url){$web=New-Object Net.WebClient;$web.Headers.Add('X-aws-ec2-metadata-token',$token);try{$output=$web.DownloadString($url);return($output);}catch{return}}Function explore_api($path_dict){foreach ($path in $path_dict.Keys){if ($path.substring($path.length -1,1) -ne '/'){$fullUrl=$metadata_server + $path;$result=api_gen $fullUrl;if ($returnValue){$result_dict[$path]=$result;}}else{$fullUrl=$metadata_server + $path;$returnValue=api_gen $fullUrl;if ($returnValue){$temp_dict=New-Object 'System.Collections.Generic.Dictionary[string,string]';$resultArray=$returnValue.split([Environment]::NewLine);foreach ($result in $resultArray){if ($result -ne ''){$temp_dict[$path+$result]='';}}explore_api $temp_dict;}}}}Function init($url){$returnValue=api_gen $url;if ($returnValue){$path_dict=New-Object 'System.Collections.Generic.Dictionary[string,string]';$resultArray=$returnValue.split([Environment]::NewLine);foreach ($result in $resultArray){$path_dict[$result+'/']='';}return $path_dict;}}$path_dict=init $metadata_server;explore_api $path_dict;$result_dict | ConvertTo-JSON;

commands.name: dotNetAssemblyTrace
commands.command_line: "C:\Windows\System32\WindowsPowerShell\V1.0\powershell.exe" -NonInteractive -WindowStyle Hidden -NoProfile function Get-DotNetTrace { Param ([Parameter(Mandatory)][System.IO.FileInfo]$Output); logman start trace dotNetAssemblyTrace -p '{A669021C-C450-4609-A035-5AF59AF4DF18}' 0x48 0x4 -o $Output -ow -ets; if ($LASTEXITCODE) { Write-Host "dotNetAssemblyTrace data Collector set already created. Stopping it and trying again"; logman stop dotNetAssemblyTrace -ets; logman start trace dotNetAssemblyTrace -p '{A669021C-C450-4609-A035-5AF59AF4DF18}' 0x48 0x4 -o $Output -ow -ets; }; if ($LASTEXITCODE) { Write-Host "Failed to start the trace" -ForegroundColor Red; exit 1; }; Start-Sleep -Seconds 5; logman stop dotNetAssemblyTrace -ets; exit $LASTEXITCODE; }; Get-DotNetTrace -Output "C:\Windows\TEMP\WorkingTemp\dotNetAssemblyTrace.etl"
